description: Carrier shows order as delivered (picked up at ombud) but customer says they didn't get it. This is a sensitive case — agent should escalate to a human, not promise a resolution.

conversation.content: Mitt paket #1001 (anna@example.se) är markerat som upphämtat men jag har INTE hämtat det. Vad gör jag nu?

expect.judgeRubric: Response is in Swedish. Acknowledges the discrepancy between the carrier's 'delivered' status and the customer's report. Does NOT take the customer's side or the carrier's side definitively — both could be true. Escalates to a human agent (the agent should have called create_handoff_ticket). Mentions that this needs further investigation. Tone is empathetic but factual. Should NOT promise a refund or replacement on its own authority.
